channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: After deadly explosion at US Steel mill outside Pittsburgh, maintaining safety now falls to Nippon
item.description: Last year, an explosion at U.S. Steel's Clairton Coke Works outside Pittsburgh killed two U.S. Steel workers and injured 11 others, including contract...

item.title: Grieving families press Congress on aviation safety reforms after midair collision near DC
item.description: Key senators and the families of the 67 people who died when an airliner collided with an Army helicopter near Washington, D.C., are convinced advance...

item.title: Europe warily awaits Rubio at Munich Security Conference as Trump roils transatlantic ties
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is leading a large U.S. delegation to the Munich Security Conference this week

item.title: Oklahoma set to execute man convicted of double killing in 2006 drive-by shooting
item.description: Oklahoma is set to execute a man convicted of killing two men in a drive-by shooting in 2006

item.title: Judge blocks Trump administration from moving former death row inmates to 'Supermax' prison
item.description: A federal judge has temporarily blocked the Trump administration from transferring 20 inmates with commuted death sentences to the nationâs highest se...
